---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?
Describe the gap or pain point this feature would address.

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches you thought about and why you dismissed them.

## Additional context
Mockups, references, or any other relevant context.
